drugs.notes: Short to intermediate-acting benzodiazepine metabolized primarily by CYP3A4. Sensitive substrate; exposure significantly increased by strong CYP3A4 inhibitors and reduced by inducers. Abrupt discontinuation may precipitate withdrawal, including seizures.

Associated with QT prolongation and cardiotoxicity risk, especially in overdose or polypharmacy.
